currentFAQs.q: How much does a kitchen remodel cost in {{CITY}}?
currentFAQs.a: Most homeowners in {{CITY}} pay between {{AVG_LOW}} and {{AVG_HIGH}} for a kitchen remodel, depending on scope and finishes.

currentFAQs.q: How long does a kitchen remodel take?
currentFAQs.a: A minor cosmetic remodel takes 4-6 weeks. A mid-range remodel takes 8-12 weeks. A major gut renovation can take 3-5 months or longer.

currentFAQs.q: What is the best ROI for a kitchen remodel?
currentFAQs.a: Mid-range kitchen remodels typically recoup 60-80% of their cost at resale. Minor cosmetic updates often provide the highest return on investment.
